name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn
State == [p \in 1..N |-> state[p] \in {idle, trying, critical}]

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ N \in Nat
          /\ N > 0
          /\ state \in [1..N -> {idle, trying, critical}]
          /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Initial condition *)
Init == /\ turn \in 1..N
        /\ state \in [1..N -> idle]

(* Next action *)
Next == \/ \* Process p attempts to enter critical section
        /\ \E p \in 1..N :
          /\ state[p] = idle
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = trying]
          /\ turn' = turn
        \/ \* Process p enters critical section
        /\ \E p \in 1..N :
          /\ state[p] = trying
          /\ turn = p
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = critical]
          /\ turn' = turn
        \/ \* Process p exits critical section
        /\ \E p \in 1..N :
          /\ state[p] = critical
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = idle]
          /\ turn' = turn

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -1]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ states[i] = "thinking"
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
                /\ forks' = forks
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ states[i] = "hungry"
                /\ forks[i] = -1
                /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = -1
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ states[i] = "eating"
                /\ forks[i] = i
                /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = i
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![%(i, N) + 1] = -1]
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* TypeOK ensures that q is a sequence of length K, head and tail are integers in 0..K-1, and size is an integer in 0..K *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(K)
  /\ head \in 0..K-1
  /\ tail \in 0..K-1
  /\ size \in 0..K

(* The queue is represented as a circular buffer of length K. 
   head points to the next element to be consumed.
   tail points to the next position to be produced.
   size is the number of elements in the queue. *)

Init == 
  /\ q = <<>>
  /\ head = 0
  /\ tail = 0
  /\ size = 0

(* Producer action: enqueues an element if the queue is not full *)
Producer == 
  /\ size < K
  /\ q' = Append(q, newElem)
  /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \mod K
  /\ size' = size + 1
  /\ head' = head

(* Consumer action: dequeues an element if the queue is not empty *)
Consumer == 
  /\ size > 0
  /\ q' = Tail(q)
  /\ head' = (head + 1) \mod K
  /\ size' = size - 1
  /\ tail' = tail

Next == 
  \/ Producer
  \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>> /\ TypeOK

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active, r

Init == /\ readers = <<>> \\
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers \\
          /\ r \in readers \\
             /\ r' \in readers \\
             /\ writer_active' = writer_active \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
             /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers \\
             /\ r \in readers \\
                /\ r' \in readers \\
                /\ writer_active' = TRUE \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE \\
             /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers \\
             /\ r \in readers \\
                /\ r' \in readers \\
                /\ writer_active' = writer_active \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE \\
             /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers \\
             /\ r \in readers \\
                /\ r' \in readers \\
                /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES token, messages

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ messages \in 1..N -> [msg \in 1..N -> BOOLEAN]

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ messages' \in 1..N -> [msg \in 1..N -> BOOLEAN]
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
           /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = token THEN [msg \in 1..N |-> FALSE] ELSE messages[i] ]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, messages>>

---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] \in Values

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Min(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x =< y


CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_CAPACITY, SeqIndices
VARIABLES channel, chunks, file, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ chunks \in Seq
    /\ sentChunks \in Seq
    /\ retransmitCount \in Seq
    /\ channel \in Seq

Init ==
    /\ file = Seq
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Len(file) \div CHUNK_SIZE |-> SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE+1, Min(i*CHUNK_SIZE, Len(file)))]
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = [i \in 1..Len(chunks) |-> 0]
    /\ channel = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ \E i \in 1..Len(chunks) :
        /\ i \notin SeqIndices(sentChunks)
        /\ retransmitCount[i] < MAX_RETRIES
        /\ channel' = Append(channel, chunks[i])
        /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, i)
        /\ retransmitCount' = [j \in 1..Len(chunks) |-> IF j = i THEN retransmitCount[j] + 1 ELSE retransmitCount[j]]
    \/ \E i \in 1..Len(chunks) :
        /\ i \in SeqIndices(sentChunks)
        /\ retransmitCount[i] < MAX_RETRIES
        /\ channel' = Append(channel, chunks[i])
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
        /\ retransmitCount' = [j \in 1..Len(chunks) |-> IF j = i THEN retransmitCount[j] + 1 ELSE retransmitCount[j]]
    \/ /\ channel' = <<>>
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
        /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, channel>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ clocks[i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]
        /\ offsets = [j \in 1..N |-> offsets[j] + (Avg(clocks) - clocks[j])]
        /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ clocks[i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]
        /\ offsets = [j \in 1..N |-> offsets[j] + (Avg(clocks) - clocks[j])]

Avg(c) == Sum(c) \div Len(c)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == \/ /\ free # {}
          /\ free' = free \ {p}
             /\ allocated' = [c \in Client |-> IF c = client THEN allocated[c] \cup {p}

          /\ free' = free
             /\ allocated' = [c \in Client |-> IF c = client THEN allocated[c] \ {p}

             /\ p \in free
                /\ p \in allocated[client]
                /\ free' = free \ {p}
                   /\ allocated' = [c \in Client |-> IF c = client THEN allocated[c] \ {p}


TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ allocated \in [Client -> SUBSET Pages]
          /\ \A c \in Client: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c1, c2 \in Client: c1 # c2 => allocated[c1] # allocated[c2]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
       /\ \A n \in Node: counts[n] = [m \in Node |-> 0]

Next == /\ \A n \in Node: counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> counts[n][m] + 1]]
       /\ \A n \in Node: counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> Max(counts[n][m], counts'[m][n])]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
